import axios from"axios";const api=axios.create({baseURL:process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||"http://localhost:5000",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},timeout:8000});// Attach JWT token automatically
api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=sessionStorage.getItem("token");if(token)config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);return config;});export const loginUser=async(username,password)=>{const response=await api.post("/login",{username,password});return response.data;};export const verifyToken=async()=>{const response=await api.get("/verify");return response.data;};export default api;
